localized title: Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time
plot outline: Set in the mystical lands of Persia, a rogue prince and a mysterious princess race against dark forces to safeguard an ancient dagger capable of releasing the Sands of Time -- a gift from the gods that can reverse time and allow its possessor to rule the world.
title: Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time
original title: Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time

visual effects.name: Ana Sofia Mestre de Almeida Pereira

akas: Prince of Persia: Les sables du temps (France)
Prince of Persia: Der Sand der Zeit (Germany)
Prince of Persia: Las arenas del tiempo (Spain)

distributors.name: Walt Disney Studios Sony Pictures Releasing (WDSSPR)
